description: Gut/plasma physiological model parameters — same as comp-004 unless noted. Used for IC50 occupancy calculations.
abcg2_expression_note: ABCG2 is most expressed in proximal SI (duodenum/jejunum). 250 mL volume estimate may underestimate concentration in proximal SI by 2-3×.
urat1_location_note: URAT1 is on apical brush border of kidney proximal tubule — accessed via plasma → glomerular filtrate. Plasma Cmax is the relevant gating concentration.
xo_location_note: Xanthine oxidase is in liver, intestinal epithelium, vascular endothelium — accessed via plasma. Plasma Cmax is the relevant gating concentration.
nlrp3_location_note: NLRP3 is in macrophages and other innate immune cells — accessed via tissue interstitium; plasma Cmax is the relevant gating concentration.
